title: Secret Network Partners with moonCat AI to Optimize Confidential AI Liquidity on the Superchain
message_html: Secret Network Partners with moonCat AI to Optimize Confidential AI Liquidity on the Superchain ...
snippet: Secret Network (@SecretNetwork): Secret Network Partners with moonCat AI to Optimize Confidential AI Liquidity on the Superchain Secret Network, the leading platform for Web3 data privacy, today announced a strategic partnership with MoonCat AI, a Superchain-native DeFi protocol focused on AI-driven
